CustomField.description: Parent opportunity for this trip. This master-detail relationship enables automatic cost aggregation via roll-up summary. The trip inherits sharing and security from the parent opportunity. Cannot be reparented after creation.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The parent opportunity for this trip. Required at creation and cannot be changed afterward. When creating a trip from an opportunity's related list, this field is pre-filled.
CustomField.label: Opportunity
